subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Your letter from Edinburgh was received. Its contents were most pleasing, and therefore brought the utmost joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه شما از ادین برگ رسید مضامین دلنشین بود لهذا نهایت سرور حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @transcending the material condition, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
